title: tetragonolobus maritimus subsp. siliquosus
intro: Tetragonolobus maritimus subsp. siliquosus, also known as the horse bean or four-angled bean, is a type of legume plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Tetragonolobus maritimus subsp. siliquosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
